item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
good times
i'm on team sugar
always trying to catch me ridin dirty
accurate
some of the best clicks
that's odd
mmm hmm
as is tradition
nothing like a jersey olive garden
never knew i needed a gorilla sofa until now
finally
uncanny
true facts
those crazy brits
yes everything?
indeed it is
that's my time... have a great night gang!!

item.title: How to meet your best friend

item.title: Sorry, I don't know how to tag people. Thanks #thefreepizzadude!
item.description: Decided to bypass the the middleman and just surprise my friend with a couple large pizzas and some cheesy bread. I know he's too proud to ask for anything but I also know he really needs this and it will make him happy and feel loved. He's a great guy and totally deserves it.
item.dc:creator: meme2theextreme

item.title: The only drawback to getting drunk on 13.5% ABV red wine is you can't chug it to hurry it up.
item.description: I hung out with friends all day. I have awesome friends. I drove to their places and gave them aall of Snooks's stuff, her toys, towers, and food. Came back home and the vet called and I absolutely fucking lost it. I have never cried that hard or that loudly in my entire life, not even as a kid. They didn't charge for the euthanasia. Great people. Now I'm home alone. Getting drunk as fast as I can. I can't thank all you enough. Imgur is the greatest community of good people on the Net. This is gonna take fucking days to get over.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: 4H Grand Champion
item.description: My siblings are 15+ years younger so our relationship has always been different. My sister called me, on her own, for the first time ever to tell me she won. And she is going for Master Showman! ???
item.dc:creator: Jessee365

item.title: Friends are getting desperate to find a home for this little guy. He’s 2 years old, needs shots and needs to be fixed and currently in OC California. I’ve reached out to all my usual spots so this is my last ditch effort. Dm w/ any leads please
item.description: *Update* - he may have found a home! Waiting on confirmation still but we appreciate all the support and kind words ❤️
item.dc:creator: Thatshortblondegirl

item.title: that's that I guess
item.description: Edit: - Call 988 in the States if you need help, please - https://988lifeline.org There's never enough coffee. For some reason, imagining that he spent his life battling a demon gives me a sense of peace. A demon so old that time stretched it out like string, taught, and sharp. I imagine this demon was always with him, a singularity of misanthropic vanity, gnawing at his soul like a hollow echo from a breath away. My friend's life was one of commitment, service, curiosity, and love of community. His friendships were long and deep. His sharp intelligence and air of professional levity was always welcome in any situation. He taught himself things - languages, instruments - and was usually willing to try something new. Of course, no one knew about the demon. No one knew that why my friend kept pushing to better himself, kept volunteering, serving his community, teaching himself things, was because he loved it, but also because if he gave even a moment of doubt, or worry, or hurt, it could enter. And at some point, it did. It snuck in, and sat like a pit in the throat, waiting. I don't understand what draws someone to suicide. What forces are battling in someone's mind, what outside pressures tighten at the throat, and cause a wakefulness so burdensome they seek rest above all. I know that two weeks ago the demon overcame him, and plunged him into an abyss where no light could reach. I don't know how, but he dragged that thing with him, the first and only strong enough to do so. He had been fighting the demon for so long, and had planned everything down to the final moment. The demon felt surprise, a brief interlude of something, then the feeling left and it realized the decit, it had lost, it was beaten. And in its long, long, existence, the demon finally felt the dread weight of its actions on the living, falling to its utter oblivion, completely forgotten, fading into the universe. Knowing he had beaten the demon, my friend could be at peace. -- -- Most viral edit: - Call 988 in the States if you need help, please - https://988lifeline.org
item.dc:creator: dbombadil

item.title: A peek behind the curtain.
item.dc:creator: dickwitfo

item.title: Thursday Phone Clearing DUMP (Mostly GAMING Memes)
item.description:
1. Yeah, most games are like this nowadays
2. How modern movies and games write villains these days. Personally I like The Last of Us show, but I feel we didn't feel we need to learn empatehtic POV of every single character. Like the Kaitlin lady and her squad was kind of the worst part of the show
3. GREAT STICK
4. This guy has his priorities straight
5
6. Yeah... something I noticed when getting a bit older. You start to suck at games, and not just new ones! Even games that you were good at 10 years ago...
7. This show actually used the GTA map :D
8. Am I old or is Gen Alpha kinda ... well what ever this is... and they gonna be calling themselves Alphas would be peak irony. Also fuck naming "generations" every 10 years. Like a generation isn't DONE when the hit 25-30. WTF
9. Yes you are, now come to bed!
10. This might work... on the 3rd version of the film, which would be the final Rated R Director's Cut
11. Yooo, why yell at me?! I didn't write these shows
12. Seriously do you think you will ever stop playing games? Like old people still watch TV and books like they did in their teens. To me it's just another form of entertainment and story telling.
13
14. I'm in my 30's and occasionally I try to see if I have Jedi powers.... Who else does this?
15. This Judgmental Washing Machine I just added to my game! P.S. When not posting on Imgur, I work on a passion project of mine, called Do Not Press The Button. It's kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable and if you like the game and the humor in this dump, I think it's for you. Please help out with a wishlist, even if you don't planing on buying it on launch. Right now I just need to build my wishlist numbers, so Steam will show it to more players: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ Thank you for your support! P.S. Since I got you here, can I get your opinion on the short description of the game? Game festival season is coming and I want to submit my game to quite a few. Do you think this is a good and captivating description: "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse) is a first-person exploration game featuring comedic narration by The Developer, who questions, taunts, and tests you at every turn. You should not press the button, but you will want to. You will have control, and you will have none. The fate of the multiverse is in your hands—or is it? Inspired by narrative-driven games like 'The Stanley Parable,' Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse) challenges the conventions of storytelling and player agency, inviting them into a universe where every action is met with unexpected (and some times humorous) results. "
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames
